name: City of London Group plc
summary: City of London Group plc primarily focuses on the provision of finance to the SME sector in the United Kingdom. It offers asset backed finance products, commercial loans, debt finance products, and leasing services to SMEs; loans to professional practice firms; and management services to third-party funds. The company also provides property loans for acquisitions, development, refinancing, and refurbishments; and arranges, administers, and provides home reversion plans for the residential property market. In addition, it offers financial services, including mortgages, commercial lending, insurance, life protection, wealth management, pension, and financial planning advice to private individuals and multinational global corporates. City of London Group plc was incorporated in 1981 and is based in London, the United Kingdom.
